flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at DePauw University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (78.5% → 68.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at DePauw University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at DePauw University are 33% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($70.5k vs $52.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at DePauw University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.9k).
